examples: He was given the job, temporary at first, of king of Transjordan, a land considered unimportant, except in its relation to Palestine.
In 1946, Britain recognised the independence of the protectorate of Transjordan.
Twenty-five years before, Britain -- which was made trustee under the Mandate in 1920 -- converted the eastern three-quarters of Palestine into the Emirate of Transjordan.
